params.name: Ave Maria
params.description:
On Dec 26, 1545 AD, Caccini completed the famous Ave Maria.
The Ave Maria is a vocal piece by composer Giulio Caccini, set in the background of Johann Sebastian Bach's Prelude in C major. It is a soprano aria with a wide vocal range and lyrics from a Catholic prayer to the Virgin Mary. Caccini's skillful combination of melody and lyrics creates a pure and lofty atmosphere, making it a classic of religious music.
